top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.name LIKE '% foil %' ESCAPE '\'
  AND s.code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.code
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%United States%' OR c2.availability = 'US'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND c.hasFoil = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.name LIKE '% foil %' ESCAPE '\'
  AND s.code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.code
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%United States%' OR c2.availability = 'US'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND c.hasFoil = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.type LIKE '%Foil%'
  AND s.code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.code
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%United States%' OR c2.availability = 'US'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.name LIKE '% foil %' ESCAPE '\'
  AND s.code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.code
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%United States%' OR c2.availability = 'US'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.flavorText LIKE '%foil%'
  AND s.id NOT IN (
    SELECT s2.id
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%US%'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND c.hasFoil = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM sets s
JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND fd.language = 'Japanese'
  AND fd.name LIKE '% foil %' ESCAPE '\'
  AND s.code NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.code
    FROM sets s2
    JOIN cards c2 ON s2.code = c2.setCode
    WHERE c2.availability LIKE '%United States%' OR c2.availability = 'US'
  );
